scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: sh -c 'if [ -x ./.venv/bin/python ]; then ./.venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s apps/server/tests -p "test_*.py" -t apps/server; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -m unittest discover -s apps/server/tests -p "test_*.py" -t apps/server; else echo "Python not found"; exit 1; fi'
